summary: Verified SW warning fix on iteration 15. Home loads clean with 0 service worker registrations and no SW-related console warnings/errors. Bar Basso detail page renders with map iframe, YouTube (i.ytimg.com) thumbnails, and share button. /city/Milan renders correctly with 2 bar cards.

No 'service worker navigation preload' warnings in console
No console warnings/errors of any kind after 2.5s load
/place/{Bar Basso id} detail page renders (hero, verdict, score 9.1/10, sentiment)
Map iframe present on detail page (1 iframe)
4 YouTube i.ytimg.com thumbnails rendered on Bar Basso detail
Share button visible on detail page
/city/Milan renders city hub with 2 verified spots (Bars category)
notes: The /analyze route sub-flow was not fully exercised (input selector timed out on that route), but the primary regression scope (home + place detail + city hub + SW cleanup) is fully verified. Kochi discover was not tested as part of this quick verification of a trivial fix.
